Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class Name

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.Name
public class Name extends SObject

Java class for Name complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="Name">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Alias" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Email" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FirstName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsActive" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastReferencedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastViewedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NameOrAlias" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Phone" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Profile" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Profile" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ProfileId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordType" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}RecordType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RecordTypeId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Title" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Type" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRole" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}UserRole" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UserRoleId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Username" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
